1. Brave Search API key вЂ” needed for research/signal agents
   Sign up: https://api.search.brave.com
   (Free tier available вЂ” takes 2 mins)

2. Cloudflare re-auth for missioncontrol.nthlayer.co.uk
   Run in WSL: /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/bin/cloudflared tunnel login
   Then authorise nthlayer.co.uk in the browser popup

3. WSL shutdown вЂ” run once in Windows PowerShell:
   wsl --shutdown
   (Fixes LinkedIn automation вЂ” 10 seconds, huge unlock)

4. Google Drive API вЂ” enable at:
   https://console.developers.google.com (project ef901e5d)

5. Podcast list вЂ” share URLs/show names for the transcription agent

6. Telegram pairing вЂ” when you first message the Telegram bot, approve via:
   openclaw pairing approve telegram <CODE>
